narrative: AI Engineer with five years at Ola, a product‑focused mobility startup, brings solid verified skill depth in AI/ML pipelines. This depth is the main reason for his placement, complemented by a respectable breadth of technical skills across data engineering and model deployment. His experience with Milvus, OpenSearch, Qdrant, and BM25 aligns directly with the search‑and‑retrieval focus of the role, and his product‑company background suggests he can ship features end‑to‑end. However, his current location in Toronto, limited platform engagement, and minor trust flags lower his overall score, and his notice period is unknown.
